detail.handoff_question: Can the h4/L5 environment-resource envelope survive shared-medium perturbation without merge/relabel leakage while preserving boundary separation, loop feedback, budget validity, and claim boundaries?

git.head: not_recorded_in_artifact
git.policy: git metadata excluded to keep artifact replay portable

floor_sensitivity.canonical_precision_rule: JSON stores numeric scores directly before report formatting; I9 replay must preserve equality-at-floor semantics.
